urdu transliteration text: Pehlu Bhi Shikasta Hay Turbat Bhi Shikasta Hay.
english translation text: Her Ribs are broken, her grave is destroyed too

urdu transliteration text: Kya Haal Yeh Ummat Nay. Zahra Ka Banaaya Hay
english translation text: What have the followers of the Prophet done to Zahra?

urdu transliteration text: Khatoon Koyi Ghum Say, Yun Churr Nayhi DekhiAisi Koyi Duniya May, Mastoor Nayhi Dekhi
english translation text: We haven’t seen a lady inflicted with so much tragedy. History has never witnessed such a woman…

urdu transliteration text:
Athaara Baras May Hi, Lagti Jo Zaeefa Hay
Who looks old despite being only Eighteen years old
Darbaar May Zaalim Nay, Ki Aisi PazeerayiKis Tarha Say Tu Bibi, Phir Laut Kay Ghaar Aayi
english translation text: What kind of a welcome did you receive in the court? In what manner did you return home, O Bibi?

urdu transliteration text: Baalon Ki Safaydi Nay, Sab Haal Sunaaya Hay
english translation text: The whiteness of your hair explains the entire story

.Tu Roti Rahi Ghar May, Haider Say Bhi Chup Chup KayIsmat Ki Tarha Dukh Bhi, Parday May Rahay Teray
At home, you would cry, hiding your pain from Imam Ali. Just like your chastity, even your pains remained veiled

urdu transliteration text: Kuch Dard Teray Bibi, Bus Jaanti Fizza Hay…..
english translation text: Some of your pains O Bibi, are known only to Bibi Fizza

urdu transliteration text: Do Aisay Janaazay Hay, Taarikh May Jo UthayBus Ghaar Kay Hi Logo Nay, Dono Ko Diye Kaanday
english translation text:
In history, there were two such funerals…
That had only the members of the household present to carry the body

urdu transliteration text: Ek Fatima Zahra Hay, Ek Baali Sakina Hay…..
english translation text: One is Fatima Zahra and the other is little Sakina

urdu transliteration text: Marham Teray Zakhmon Ka, Bibi Na Mila Ab TakAulaad-e- umayya Ki, Baaqi Hay Jafaa Ab Tak
english translation text: Till this day, there is no cure to the pain you suffered. The inflictions of Bani Ummayya continue till this day

urdu transliteration text: Ronay Peh Bhi Pehra Tah, Turbat Peh Bhi Pehra Hay
english translation text: You were not allowed to cry and we are not allowed to visit your grave

urdu transliteration text: Mismaar Tera Roza, Ummat Nay Kiya Jab SayBaba Tera Rehta Hay, Turbat Peh Teri Tab Say
english translation text: Since the Ummah destroyed your grave. Your father (SAW) stays at your grave

urdu transliteration text: Kab Ghumbad-e- Khizra May, Baba Tera Rehta Hay
english translation text: When does your father (SAW) rest under the Green Dome now?
